entry.title: IBM to acquire HRL Laboratories
entry.summary: Exploring the storied history of HRL Laboratories, from the invention of the laser to silicon spin qubits.

entry.title: Google CEO Pichai says Gemini's next leap depends on building "much larger base models"
entry.summary: Alphabet has raised its 2026 investment forecast to as much as $205 billion, saying demand continues to outpace spending. Google Cloud grew 82 percent in the second quarter. CEO Sundar Pichai says Google needs a larger base model for its next leap in AI and has kicked off an ambitious Gemini 4 training run. The article

entry.title: Filing: Alphabet holds $94.1B in SpaceX equity post-IPO; $80B are under short-term sale restrictions, while $14.1B remain long-term restricted until Q3 2027 (Sarah Frier/Bloomberg)
entry.summary: Sarah Frier / Bloomberg : Filing: Alphabet holds $94.1B in SpaceX equity post-IPO; $80B are under short-term sale restrictions, while $14.1B remain long-term restricted until Q3 2027 — Alphabet Inc.'s Google said its equity holdings include $94.1 billion in SpaceX shares, after the space-and-AI company's blockbuster in

entry.title: llama.cpp b10103 released
entry.summary: metal : add f16 type support to leaky relu ( #25981 )

entry.title: SAAG: Structured Agent Assessment and Grounding
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.18245v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Exact-match evaluation of agent-calling obscures qualitatively different failure modes: a model may select the right function yet hallucinate argument values, or satisfy a schema while choosing a agent for the wrong reason. Existing benchmarks collapse these distinctions

entry.title: GCM Grosvenor Raises $1.2 Billion for Credit Secondaries Push
entry.summary: GCM Grosvenor has raised $1.2 billion for its first dedicated fund strategy targeting credit secondaries.

entry.title: Sponsored: From chip to grid to orbit: Yotta 2026 launches full agenda
entry.summary: The complete program for the Sept. 28-30 Las Vegas event is now live, with 250+ speakers spanning every corner of the AI infrastructure ecosystem. Pass prices increase Aug. 21

entry.title: Save 10% on the brand-new Creality Pika 3D scanner — easily scan models and textures for $629
entry.summary: Pre-purchase Creality's portable Pika 3D scanner at a discount. First come, first served: a 10% saving if you act within 19 days.

entry.title: Poolside's Laguna S 2.1 is a small open-weight coding model that punches well above its size
entry.summary: Poolside has released Laguna S 2.1, its third coding model in three months. Rather than rely on raw scale, the company trained it to keep checking its work, revise failed approaches, and avoid giving up too soon during long agentic sessions. The compact model beats several much larger rivals in benchmarks. Poolside say

entry.title: Stateful Guardrails for Multi-Turn LLM Systems: A Conversational Risk Accumulation Framework
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.19361v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Most safety guardrails for large language models (LLMs) evaluate each prompt-response pair in isolation, which misses failures that arise only over a dialogue as benign turns compose into harm. We term this Conversational Risk Accumulation (CRA): gradual intent drift, fra

entry.title: Microsoft Defender Blocks Email Prompt Injection Attacks Before They Reach Copilot - cyberpress.org
entry.summary: Microsoft Defender Blocks Email Prompt Injection Attacks Before They Reach Copilot cyberpress.org

entry.title: EU fines Google $1 billion for search, app store antitrust violations
entry.summary: The European Commission fined Google €890 million ($1 billion) on Thursday after finding the company had violated the European Union's Digital Markets Act (DMA), which ensures fair online competition. [...]

entry.title: Chaos ransomware's msaRAT: Living off the browser to build a covert C2 channel
entry.summary: The Chaos ransomware group uses new malware "msaRAT" that hijacks browsers. The malware doesn't communicate directly with C2 but connects through the browser. It enables arbitrary command execution while hiding the attacker's IP from victims via WebRTC over TURN.

entry.title: The Rise And Rise Of Billion-Dollar-Plus Rounds
entry.summary: So far this year, 60% of global startup funding across stages — around $320 billion — went to rounds of $1 billion or more, per Crunchbase data, with such rounds instrumental in pushing global funding for the first half of the year to record levels.

entry.title: Quoting Seth Larson
entry.summary: The Python Package Index (PyPI) now rejects new files being uploaded to releases that are older than 14 days. This restriction was put in place to prevent old and long-stable releases from being poisoned in case publishing tokens or workflows of PyPI projects were compromised. As far as we are aware this has not yet be

entry.title: NVIDIA Open Sources First GPU-Accelerated Medical Physics Simulation Framework
entry.summary: Before a healthcare robot can be useful in the real world, it has to learn how the physical world pushes back. Anatomy varies. Instruments bend, press, slip and interact with tissue. Imaging can be noisy or incomplete. And the rare, edge scenarios developers most need to understand don’t appear on schedule. That create

entry.title: D-Wave Quantum to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 6
entry.summary: Insider Brief Press release – D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) (“D-Wave” or the “Company”), the only dual-platform quantum computing company providing both annealing and gate-model systems, software and services, today announced it will release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 ended June 30, 2026 on

entry.title: ollama v0.32.3 released
entry.summary: What's Changed mlx update by @dhiltgen in #17332 model/parsers: finalize incomplete GLM tool calls by @dhiltgen in #17250 docs: update retirements by @mxyng in #17289 model: align Laguna with upstream llama.cpp by @dhiltgen in #17335 Full Changelog : v0.32.2...v0.32.3-rc0

entry.title: Bipartisan House lawmakers introduce the AI Kill Switch Act, which would grant the US DHS authority to shut down or throttle AI models that it deems dangerous (Politico)
entry.summary: Politico : Bipartisan House lawmakers introduce the AI Kill Switch Act, which would grant the US DHS authority to shut down or throttle AI models that it deems dangerous — A bipartisan House bill slated to be introduced on Thursday would give the Department of Homeland Security the authority …

entry.title: The Senate's Clarity Act, a crypto industry-backed bill set for a vote this summer, is mired in debate over rules to stop Trump from selling digital currencies (David Yaffe-Bellany/New York Times)
entry.summary: David Yaffe-Bellany / New York Times : The Senate's Clarity Act, a crypto industry-backed bill set for a vote this summer, is mired in debate over rules to stop Trump from selling digital currencies — Democrats and Republicans are haggling about the Clarity Act, a major bill pushed by the crypto industry, as it moves c

entry.title: No one believes a 35B runs on a phone, so I stopped explaining and tried to build a use case (open source repo)
entry.summary: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, Q4_K_M, stock llama.cpp, airplane mode. Between 1.3 and 6.8 tok/s, ten minutes start to finish. On the fitting question, since it always comes up: 35B total, 3B active per token. The always-needed parts stay in RAM, the experts get read from flash when they're called. Memory holds the active path, not

entry.title: How Schneider Electric Built Their LLMOps Foundations With LangSmith
entry.summary: Learn how Schneider Electric built enterprise LLMOps foundations with LangSmith to improve observability, evaluation, and deployment for AI products at scale.

entry.title: Alphabet’s Century Bond Has Now Lost a 10th of Its Face Value
entry.summary: A 100-year bond that Alphabet Inc. issued earlier this year in the sterling market as it gorged on debt around the world has dropped below 90 pence on the pound for the first time.

entry.title: India May Allow Portfolio Managers to Take Unhedged Short Bets
entry.summary: India’s securities regulator has proposed allowing domestic portfolio management service providers to take short positions in equity derivatives for the first time, easing rules for professional money managers even as it tightens oversight of retail trading.

entry.title: Calibrated Selective Fact-Checking via Evidence Chain Evaluation
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.18240v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can achieve strong fact-checking accuracy, yet forced binary decisions conceal a critical reliability problem: systems may issue confident verdicts even when supporting evidence is weak, sparse, or internally inconsistent. We address this issu

entry.title: SysAdmin: Measuring Instrumental Power-Seeking in Frontier AI
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.18239v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Power-seeking defined as behaviors where AI systems acquire resources, evade oversight, or resist termination beyond task requirements is identified as a key driver of Loss of Control (LoC) risk. In this work, we introduce SysAdmin, a benchmark that positions frontier lan

entry.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Security Plugin for Claude Code in Beta: A Multi-Agent Vulnerability Scanner That Runs in Your Terminal
entry.summary: Anthropic has released the Claude Security plugin for Claude Code in beta. The plugin runs a multi-agent vulnerability scan of a repository from inside an existing Claude Code session, then turns the findings you select into patch files that you review and apply yourself. Anthropic emphasized the tool’s versatility upo

entry.title: Galaxy Digital Launches $5 Million Bitcoin Quantum Readiness Initiative
entry.summary: Digital asset and data center infrastructure firm Galaxy Digital Inc. (Nasdaq: GLXY) has announced the launch of the Galaxy Bitcoin Quantum Readiness Initiative. The multi-pillar program is designed to prepare the Bitcoin network for long-term security threats posed by advancements in quantum computing. The program foc

entry.title: Introducing AMD support
entry.summary: Hey everyone! This release brings local LLM training and inference to AMD GPUs across Windows, WSL and Linux. Read our AMD Blog + Guide Starting today, our AMD collaboration, custom Triton kernels, and math algorithms enables you to train and run 500+ models across AMD's Radeon, Instinct, Ryzen and data center GPUs, up

entry.title: Founder says DeepSeek prioritises AGI over profit, likely to keep top models open-source, Yicai reports - Reuters
entry.summary: Founder says DeepSeek prioritises AGI over profit, likely to keep top models open-source, Yicai reports Reuters
